displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #42: The Empire Strikes Back: To Be a Jedi
synopsis:
On Dagobah, Luke watches his X-wing sink into the swamp and sets up camp, only to meet a diminutive green creature who rummages through his gear and offers to lead him to the Jedi Master Yoda. At the creature's dwelling Luke grows impatient, and the gnome reveals himself to be Yoda. Believing Luke too old and reckless, Yoda is persuaded by the voice of Obi-Wan Kenobi to train him, and begins an intense regimen of physical and mental exercises to deepen Luke's use of the Force.

Elsewhere, Han, Chewbacca, Leia, and C-3PO evade Imperial ships through the asteroid field, taking shelter in what turns out to be the mouth of a giant space slug and escaping just in time. Han then flies the *Millennium Falcon* straight at the Star Destroyer *Avenger*, veering off at the last moment to latch onto the back of its hull. Vader confers with Emperor Palpatine, who names Luke Skywalker a new threat; Vader proposes turning him rather than killing him, and the Emperor agrees. When the Imperial fleet dumps its garbage, Han detaches and drifts away with the refuse before jumping to lightspeed. Vader hires bounty hunters to find the *Falcon*, and one of them, Boba Fett, follows Solo in *Slave I* as Han sets course for Bespin and his old friend Lando Calrissian.
title: Star Wars (1977) #42: The Empire Strikes Back: To Be a Jedi
